Containers.Name: CannonadeCommand
Containers.Overview:
Shoots your commands where you need them - and that very nicely.
CannonadeCommand upgrades Unraid's Docker tab into a container command post: a start plan with dependencies and readiness probes (running/tcp/http/log/exec), watchdog and time schedules; live CPU/RAM limits and CPU pinning via docker update; upload AND download bandwidth limits per container (kernel-safe netfilter policing, never a tc ingress qdisc) with live proof diagnostics; a one-click actions column; clean themeable badges with a card view. All enhanced in place on the native page - a small Go engine does the work, nothing leaves your server.
